# elasticstack_kibana_agentbuilder_export_tool (Data Source)

Export an Agent Builder tool by ID. See https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/kibana/current/agent-builder-api.html

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "elasticstack" {
  kibana {}
}

# Export a tool by ID
data "elasticstack_kibana_agentbuilder_export_tool" "my_tool" {
  id = "my-esql-tool"
}

# Export a workflow-type tool and include the referenced workflow
data "elasticstack_kibana_agentbuilder_export_tool" "my_workflow_tool" {
  id               = "my-workflow-tool"
  include_workflow = true
}

output "workflow_yaml" {
  value = data.elasticstack_kibana_agentbuilder_export_tool.my_workflow_tool.workflow_configuration_yaml
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The tool ID to export.

### Optional

- `include_workflow` (Boolean) When true, the workflow referenced by this tool will also be exported. Only valid when the tool type is `workflow`. Requires Kibana 9.4.0 or above. Defaults to false.
- `space_id` (String) An identifier for the space. If space_id is not provided, the default space is used.

### Read-Only

- `configuration` (String) The tool configuration in JSON format.
- `description` (String) Description of what the tool does.
- `readonly` (Boolean) Whether the tool is read-only.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags for categorizing and organizing tools.
- `tool_id` (String) The ID of the exported tool.
- `type` (String) The type of the tool (esql, index_search, workflow, mcp).
- `workflow_configuration_yaml` (String) The YAML configuration of the referenced workflow. Only populated when `include_workflow` is true.
- `workflow_id` (String) The ID of the referenced workflow. Only populated when `include_workflow` is true.
